extracted_information: This content details a case study of multi-factor customer verification implementation for a "Nationally Known Vape Brand" by IntuitSolutions, focusing on legal compliance for highly regulated industries. The system aims to prevent underage sales and ensure FDA guidelines are met.

Key_Integrations: Veratad Age and Identity Verification system
Veratad’s Document Capture and Management Systems (DCAMS)
Technical_Components: Behavioral algorithm to determine customer verification status and unlock Checkout page
Integration with Veratad's 2FA: SMS text message or automated voice service for unique codes
DCAMS for photo ID upload by customers when digital identity verification fails
Potential future integration: Knowledge Based Authentication (KBA) via Veratad

features.name: Two-step verification at login
features.description: After submitting username and password, user is prompted for a unique code sent to email or mobile device (SMS/phone call).

features.name: Age and identity verification during account creation
features.description: Ensures customers are 21 years of age or older and verifies their identity.

features.name: Checkout blocking for unverified customers
features.description: A behavioral algorithm determines customer's verification status and blocks access to the checkout page until verified and logged in.

features.name: Photo ID upload for unverified customers (DCAMS)
features.description: If a customer's identity cannot be digitally verified, they can upload an image of their ID for manual review by customer service on Veratad’s secure network.

statistics.Bot_Attack_Effectiveness_Reduction: 100% less effective after Google implemented Two Factor Authentication (Source: Google)

geographical_data.Regulatory_Body: United States Food and Drug Association (FDA)
